nodes.source:
struct OptionalChain {
    values: Vec<Option<i32>>,
    current_index: usize,
    sum: i32,
    some_count: usize,
    none_count: usize,
}

nodes.label: Processing State
nodes.source:
struct ProcessingState {
    messages_processed: usize,
    text_count: usize,
    media_count: usize,
    other_count: usize,
    total_media_kb: u32,
}

nodes.label: Transform State
nodes.source:
struct TransformState {
    position: (i32, i32),
    scale: f64,
    rotation: f64,
    color: (u8, u8, u8),
    commands_applied: usize,
    commands_rejected: usize,
}
